caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Rain Impact Nassau Bahamas Today
caribbean.paragraph: Nassau is experiencing moderate southeast winds sustained at 21 knots with wave heights reaching 4.8 feet and a swell period of 8 seconds. Rain chances are elevated at 79 percent, indicating intermittent showers likely to affect marine and port operations today.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and High Waves Impact Mykonos Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing sustained winds near 21 knots with wave heights reaching 7.2 feet and northerly swells around 8 seconds. Rain probability is high at 90 percent, creating challenging conditions for marine operations and outdoor activities.
